summary: Good soundboard recording of an excellent Boston Fall ’91 show.
review: The reviewer rates the concert as an excellent performance, even preferring it to the preceding Dick’s Picks volumes. No specific comments about the audio fidelity are provided, so the technical quality is assumed to be solid but unverified.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; strong praise for the show but no details on recording quality, leading to a moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any audio characteristics or issues.
